title: NESCAFÉ® Dolce Gusto® Piccolo XS Coffee Machine
detail_text: <html><head></head><body> The extra-small NESCAFÉ® Dolce Gusto® Piccolo XS capsule coffee machine, with its tiny footprint and modern style, is expertly designed to fit in any kitchen: 14cm (W) x 28cm (H) x 27cm (D). Manual Technology: Simply slide in your chosen capsule, and with a push of the button you can prepare the perfect beverage of your choice 15 Bars Max: Create professional quality coffees with a thick velvety crema, thanks to the machine’s high-pressure system (up to 15 bars). Hermetically Sealed Capsules: With our hermetically sealed capsules, which preserve coffee freshness, you’ll enjoy rich aromatic cups every time. High Quality Beverages: Enjoy over 30 premium coffee creations. From a choice of intense Espresso and full-bodied Grande, to frothy Cappuccino, hot chocolate, teas and more. Hot & Cold Function: Your Piccolo XS capsule coffee machine is so versatile that you can also prepare delicious cold beverages with ease. Eco-Mode: A convenient eco-mode feature automatically turns off your NESCAFÉ® Dolce Gusto® Piccolo XS coffee machine after 1 minute of inactivity, giving this machine an A rating in energy consumption. One-Year Guarantee: With the one-year guarantee, you don’t have to worry about your machine. To extend your coverage further, simply visit the warranty extension page. </body></html>
detail_html:
<html><head></head><body>

The extra-small NESCAFÉ® Dolce Gusto® Piccolo XS capsule coffee machine, with its tiny footprint and modern style, is expertly designed to fit in any kitchen: 14cm (W) x 28cm (H) x 27cm (D).

Manual Technology:

Simply slide in your chosen capsule, and with a push of the button you can prepare the perfect beverage of your choice

15 Bars Max:

Create professional quality coffees with a thick velvety crema, thanks to the machine’s high-pressure system (up to 15 bars).

Hermetically Sealed Capsules:

With our hermetically sealed capsules, which preserve coffee freshness, you’ll enjoy rich aromatic cups every time.

High Quality Beverages:

Enjoy over 30 premium coffee creations. From a choice of intense Espresso and full-bodied Grande, to frothy Cappuccino, hot chocolate, teas and more.

Hot & Cold Function:

Your Piccolo XS capsule coffee machine is so versatile that you can also prepare delicious cold beverages with ease.

Eco-Mode:

A convenient eco-mode feature automatically turns off your NESCAFÉ® Dolce Gusto® Piccolo XS coffee machine after 1 minute of inactivity, giving this machine an A rating in energy consumption.

One-Year Guarantee:

With the one-year guarantee, you don’t have to worry about your machine. To extend your coverage further, simply visit the warranty extension page.

</body></html>

title: Nespresso® Lattissima One Coffee Machine, Porcelain White
detail_text: Receive $10 off your first coffee order & free delivery* with minimum $40 capsules purchased. Coffees are available to purchase in Nespresso boutiques, website, mobile app or call us at 800 852 3525 (Toll-free) *Offer is valid for one month from the order date (found on the invoice) One-touch fresh coffee & milk solution The machine allows the preparation of several beverages accessible through 3 buttons only: Espresso, Lungo and milk button for coffee&milk drinks (one touch milk system). Innovative and simple fresh milk system Lattissima One is equipped with a simple single-serve system. For even more simplicity, the jug has a detachable lid, so you can easily refill it between preparations. And of course, it is dishwasher safe. Because life should be about simple pleasures. A milky treat, at the touch of a button With three milk and coffee recipes, whether Cappuccinos, Lattes or Espresso Macchiatos, it’s as simple as fill, froth, enjoy. Simply fill the milk jug with the amount you prefer and the machine will froth the milk directly into your cup. High pressure pump and energy saving The 19 bar high-performance pump offers barista-style coffee every time, perfectly extracting the delicate flavour and premium aromas of each coffee capsule and creating an incomparably dense and unctuous crema.

title: NESCAFE Dolce Gusto Genio S Touch Silver Automatic Coffee Machine
detail_text: <html><head></head><body> Creativity meets functionality - that's GENIO S. Beautifully seamless and amazingly compact, fits anywhere in your home or office while adding the perfect amount of sophistication. HIGH PRESSURE PUMP Create professional quality coffee at home in less than 30 seconds with a thick velvety crema thanks to its max 15 bars bar high-performance pump perfectly extracting the delicate flavor and premium aromas of each coffee capsule. HERMETICALLY SEALED CAPSULES With our hermetically sealed capsules, which preserve coffee freshness, you’ll enjoy rich aromatic cups every time.
